items.title: Ecosystem Roadmap
items.rationale: Dev-facing overview of ecosystem direction; useful for steering, modest external reach.

items.title: Prime Radiant
items.rationale: Flagship governance/assumption-graph 3D viz; high impact, no usage telemetry yet.

items.title: GA Chat (music-theory chatbot)
items.rationale: Broadest user-facing surface (grounded music-theory Q&A); reach high, quality still stabilizing.

items.title: Grothendieck DSL
items.rationale: Powerful categorical composition DSL; niche audience and speculative adoption.

repo_score.rationale: Music-theory engine + demos are the ecosystem's user-facing front door; reach high, value mostly declared not yet measured.
